description_long: This is a tall, rectangular snack package with a slightly curved profile and a built-in handle at the top for easy carrying. The front face features bold, distressed black and red text, partially reading 'LIMPE AS MÃOS' and 'BRANCA', with a prominent '3KG' label in red. The back side displays a list format for 'REGRAS DO ROLE' (rules of the event), with lines for writing and additional text in black. The sides are narrow and mostly white, with some partial black text wrapping around from the front and back. The material appears to be a semi-rigid, matte plastic, typical of large snack or bulk food packaging. The overall design is urban and eye-catching, suitable for display in public or communal spaces.
description: A tall, white snack package with a handle, bold black and red text, and a writable rules section on the back. The packaging is semi-rigid plastic with an urban, graphic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows bold black and red text, including 'LIMPE AS MÃOS', 'BRANCA', and a red '3KG' label.
description_view_1: Left side view is mostly white with partial black text visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_2: Back view features a writable rules section labeled 'REGRAS DO ROLE' and additional black text.
description_view_3: Right side view is similar to the left, mostly white with some black text wrapping from the front and back.
